title: Workforce Package Manifest
description: Manifest (workforce.json) at the root of a .workforce package. A package is the unit of distribution: it defines the entire workforce (agents, skills, personas, workflows, rubrics, knowledge) for a domain. The platform knows nothing until a package is installed.

specVersion.description: Version of the workforce package specification this manifest conforms to.

id.description: Globally unique reverse-DNS style package identifier.

version.description: Semantic version of the package content.

agents.description: Relative paths to agent definition files (agent.json) inside agents/.

skills.description: Relative paths to skill manifest files (skill.json) inside skills/.

personas.description: Relative paths to persona definition files (persona.json) inside personas/.

workflows.description: Relative paths to workflow definition files (workflow.json) inside workflows/.

knowledge.description: Knowledge sources to be embedded into agent memories on install.

agents.description: Agent ids whose memory receives this knowledge.

signing.description: Placeholder for package signing and provenance (Phase 4).
